patches.hypothesis: Refine the method to correctly check the comparability of the object with existing entries in the freqTable, ensuring that all objects are comparable with each other without assuming direct comparability of the input object. Additionally, handle null values gracefully, considering them invalid inputs.
patches.original_hypothesis: The method throws IllegalArgumentException when a non-comparable object is added, which is not the expected behavior according to the test. The test expects a ClassCastException if the object isn't comparable.

patches.hypothesis: The method should throw a ClassCastException instead of IllegalArgumentException when the object is not comparable.
patches.changes: - throw new ClassCastException instead of IllegalArgumentException
patches.diff: - throw new ClassCastException instead of IllegalArgumentException

patches.hypothesis: The addValue method erroneously throws an IllegalArgumentException instead of the expected ClassCastException when an object that is not comparable is added. The exception handling needs adjustment to allow the ClassCastException to propagate naturally, aligning with the test expectations.
